Wherever she steps, the dead rise to her command.
As war banners rise over the ruins of Glast Heim, and the undead legion marches to her will...
She weaves a fatal trap using the power of death.
You, them – Everyone is merely a pawn in her scheme.

A Hide & Seek Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can play as Mysterious Grimkin Hosts, who transform into furniture and hide, or as Investigative Journalists, who use the Survey Drone to find and capture them.

title: Azure Tale
notes:
1.Improved app stability, optimized user experience, and fixed some known issues.
2.Optimized device performance and significantly improved smoothness for a better experience.
3.Fixed some potential bugs and made minor improvements. Recommended for all users to update for the best experience.
4.Improved UI details and interaction logic for a more intuitive and high-quality service.

title: Tongits Go - Super Ace
notes:
New Gold Lounge Comes
Use your golds to enjoy a classic tongits game with smoother visuals. Experience familiar games in a cozier and more stylish room!

Lucky Wheel&Scratch Packages Now Unlockable
Spin the wheel and scratch for bonuses! Test your luck and win big rewards—bigger than you expect!

The Parol Adventure Event Launched
Christmas is just around the corner! Join the Parol Adventure and feel the Filipino-style holiday celebration—win amazing Christmas rewards!

Bug fixes and performance

title: Coin Master - Board Adventure
notes: Welcome to Coin Master: Board Adventure, where every dice roll takes you closer to riches, revenge, and all-out fun! Collect coins, attack villages, build your empire, and explore wild new boards full of surprises. It's not just a board game - it's a bold adventure!

title: Titan Rush: Survival
notes:
【New Content】
1. Alliance announcements can now include coordinates.
【Bugs & Optimizations】
1. Fixed and optimized some known issues in Peak Duel.
2. Fixed an issue where the activation time of nameplates redeemed in the GIFT CERTIFICATE SHOP did not match the actual activation time.
3. Fixed an issue where gift entries in the World channel would repeat when scrolling up to refresh.
4. Fixed an issue where chat golden eggs and gift bubbles could not be closed and kept displaying.

title: Bingo Voyage: Live Bingo Games
notes:
